hero.title: Secure your future with confidence.
hero.subtitle: Whether you are protecting your family, your business, or your health, we offer transparent, reliable insurance policies designed for everyday people in Myanmar.

home.typesSubtitle: Choose from our range of insurance products tailored for individuals and businesses in Myanmar.
home.howSubtitle: From choosing a plan to activating coverage — we make insurance accessible and straightforward.
home.whySubtitle: We're committed to making insurance simple, transparent, and accessible for every family in Myanmar.
home.why1Desc: No hidden fees. All policies, terms, and pricing are clearly disclosed.
home.why2Desc: Online claim submission with real-time status tracking.
home.why3Desc: Licensed agents dedicated to your specific insurance type.
home.why4Desc: Over 1 million families protected since our founding.
home.ctaBoxDesc: Join thousands of families and businesses across Myanmar who trust us with their insurance needs.
home.step1Desc: Browse our transparent insurance plans and select the one that fits your needs and budget.
home.step2Desc: Fill in the application form and submit it to your assigned insurance agent for review.
home.step3Desc: Our agents verify and forward your application to admin. You will be notified once approved.
home.step4Desc: Make your premium payment and receive your official insurance contract as a PDF.

plans.title: Plans & Premium Calculator
plans.subtitle: Find the right coverage for your needs and instantly calculate your estimated premium.
plans.headerSub: Choose the right insurance for you and your family
plans.calcSubtitle: Get an instant estimate for your policy.
plans.selectToView: Select a plan to view details
plans.selectToViewDesc: Choose an insurance plan from the dropdown to see its specific benefits, coverage limits, and premium notes.
plans.recommenderTitle: Find the right plan for you
plans.notFound: No plans found for this type
plans.loginPromptSub: Create an account and log in to apply for plans
plans.overviewEmpty: See the Tiers & Premium tab for details
plans.sampleNote: * Amounts calculated using MMK 10,000,000 coverage example
plans.docsNote: You must submit the following documents when applying for this insurance plan

how.title: How Insurance Works
how.subtitle: Everything you need to know about getting insured, paying premiums, and filing claims.
how.step1Desc: Create your free customer account with your basic information. No upfront payment required to register.
how.step2Desc: Browse all available insurance plans. Use the premium calculator to estimate your costs before committing.
how.step3Desc: Choose your desired plan, fill in the application form with your personal details, and submit it to the assigned agent.
how.step4Desc: A licensed insurance agent reviews your application for completeness and accuracy, then forwards it to admin as "Verified".
how.step5Desc: Our admin team conducts a final review. If approved, you receive a notification to proceed with payment.
how.step6Desc: Transfer the premium amount and upload your payment screenshot. Admin verifies the payment and activates your policy.
how.step7Desc: Once payment is confirmed, you receive your official insurance policy contract as a PDF document via the portal.
how.step8Desc: Your insurance coverage is now active. Receive timely payment reminders and submit claims whenever needed.
how.claimsSubtitle: How to file and track your insurance claim
how.claim1Desc: An insured event happens (accident, health issue, etc.).
how.claim2Desc: Log in, select your active policy, and submit a claim with required documents.
how.claim3Desc: Your agent reviews the claim documents and marks it as verified.
how.claim4Desc: Admin approves or rejects the claim. You are notified of the outcome.
how.claim5Desc: Approved claims are processed and compensation is disbursed to you.
how.customerDesc: Browse plans, submit applications, pay premiums, and file claims. Self-register on the portal.
how.agentDesc: Review and verify customer applications and claims before forwarding to admin. Account created by admin.
how.adminDesc: Full system control: manage packages, users, approve/reject applications and claims, send notifications.
how.ctaDesc: Join over 1 million families already protected by our insurance plans.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Reach out to our team for any insurance inquiries.

contact.subject: Subject

contact.errPhoneFormat: Phone number must start with +95 followed by 7 to 10 digits (e.g. +959xxxxxxxx).
contact.errSubjectMin: Subject must be at least 3 characters.
contact.errMessageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters.
